about.page_title: 关于 — Pulser · 构建团队
about.meta_desc: Pulser 正在构建面向现代健身的 AI 操作系统。由 GTM 优先的销售专家和拥有 30 年经验的 AI 及知识管理专家联合创立。
about.fitness_software_is_broken_were_re: 健身软件已经崩坏。我们正在重新构建。
about.pulser_is_the_operating_system_for: Pulser is the operating system for that problem. One platform for operators. One AI 教练 for 会员. A unified data layer that lets the two finally speak.
about.discovery_calls_lois_and_paid_pilo: 在推出功能之前先进行探索性沟通、LOI 和付费试点。拉动式，而非推动式。
about.peerreviewed_biomechanics_validati: 经同行评审的生物力学验证、EHDS 合规、Horizon Europe 对齐。更慢、更难，但可防御。
about.the_gym_only_wins_if_the_member_wi: The 健身房 only wins if the 会员 wins. Every feature has to prove both sides benefit.
about.were_not_hiring_yet_were_building_: We're not hiring yet — we're building and validating with the first operators, 教练 and 会员. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.
about.managed_b2b_saas_partnerships_acro: • 管理欧盟市场的 B2B SaaS 合作伙伴关系
about.previously_won_llb_02242_eu_grant: • 曾获得 LLB 02-242 欧盟资助
about.eic_accelerator_poland_prize_appli: • 已申请 EIC Accelerator + Poland Prize
about.gtmfirst_founder_sells_before_buil: • GTM 优先创始人：先销售再构建
about.30_years_in_knowledge_management_t: • 知识管理、TRIZ、AI 领域 30 余年经验
about.9_years_at_epam_systems_llmbased_t: • 在 EPAM Systems 工作 9 年 — LLM 工具开发
about.founded_zorka_lab_seka_ai_ontology: • 创立 Zorka Lab + SEKA AI（基于本体的 AI）
ai_coach.page_title: AI 教练 — Pulser · 可防御的护城河
ai_coach.meta_desc: 通过智能手机摄像头进行实时动作分析。可穿戴设备集成。预防性健康监测。符合 EHDS 标准并经同行评审。
ai_coach.ai_coach_built_into_pulserone: AI 教练 · 内置于 Pulser.One
ai_coach.a_coach_that_sees_every_rep_and: A 教练 that sees every rep. And every warning sign.
ai_coach.a_proprietary_movement_interpre: 专有的动作解析层，不是简单的封装。
ai_coach.from_rep_quality_to_retention_p: From rep quality to 留存 prediction.
ai_coach.clinically_validated_euregulate: 经临床验证。已做好欧盟监管准备。
ai_coach.the_feature_your_competitors_ca: 竞争对手无法后期补装的功能。
ai_coach.retention_amp_engagement_scorin: 留存率 & 参与度评分
ai_coach.ehdscompliant_by_design: 从设计之初即符合 EHDS
ai_coach.usercontrolled_health_data: 用户自主管理的健康数据
ai_coach.most_ai_fitness_apps_are_a_thin: Most "AI fitness" apps are a thin UI on top of someone else's API. The AI Coach inside Pulser.One is built on our own proprietary movement interpretation layer — pose estimation, biomechanical modelling, 伤害-risk scoring, periodisation. It runs on-device wherever it can, in the cloud where it needs to scale.
ai_coach.that_means_three_things_privacy: 这意味着三件事：设计之初即隐私优先，平台上每次训练都在加深的护城河，以及 SaaS CRM 无法在一个冲刺内后期补装的功能。
ai_coach.not_openai_not_a_thirdparty_api: 不是 OpenAI，不是第三方 API。动作、风险和计划生成运行在我们自己的技术栈上。
ai_coach.pose_estimation_and_form_scorin: 姿态估计和动作评分在手机本地运行。低延迟，高隐私保护。
ai_coach.injuryrisk_and_programming_mode: 损伤风险和编程模型源于已发表的生物力学研究。
ai_coach.every_session_across_pulserone_: Pulser.One、Pulser.Gym 和 Pulser.Coach 上的每一次训练都在优化模型。
ai_coach.mediapipebased_pose_estimation_: MediaPipe-based pose estimation runs on the 会员's smartphone. Frame-by-frame form feedback on squat, deadlift, bench — no special hardware required.
ai_coach.apple_watch_garmin_whoop_oura_f: Apple Watch, Garmin, Whoop, Oura feed continuous cardiovascular and recovery signals. The 教练 knows when to push and when to pull back.
ai_coach.members_can_share_injuries_chro: 会员可以分享伤病、慢性疾病和用药信息。计划根据真实的医疗情况量身定制 — 用户完全掌控数据，并符合 EHDS 规范。
ai_coach.point_your_phone_the_coach_scor: Point your phone. The 教练 scores depth, bar path, hip drive, knee tracking. Haptic or audio cues tell you what to fix — before you load another plate.
ai_coach.weekly_programming_that_adapts_: 根据实际发生的情况自适应的每周计划：错过的训练、不佳的恢复、艰难的日子。不是一份静态的 PDF。
ai_coach.combined_signals_flag_elevated_: Combined signals flag elevated 伤害 risk, signs of over训练, cardiovascular anomalies. Members are nudged — 健身房 get context.
ai_coach.for_gym_operators_a_daily_list_: For 健身房 operators: a daily list of 会员 at 流失 risk, ranked — with the reason why and the suggested intervention.
ai_coach.cto_andrei_kuryan_publishes_at_: CTO Andrei Kuryan publishes at Springer (AI-Powered Innovation, 2025). We publish biomechanics validation studies so 健身房 can sell 会员 on clinically proven AI.
ai_coach.eu_health_data_space_regulation: 欧盟健康数据空间法规（2025/327）将从 2026 年起分阶段实施。Pulser 从第一天起就按照 EHDS 标准架构设计 — 而非事后改造。
ai_coach.members_choose_what_to_share_wi: 会员自行选择分享什么、与谁分享、分享多久。数据可移植性和删除权内置于产品中，而非事后附加。
ai_coach.published_validation_unlocks_ho: 已发表的验证成果可以获得 Horizon Europe 和 EHDS 资助 — 只有以科学为导向的平台才能获得的非稀释性资金。
ai_coach.the_ai_coach_ships_with_every_c: The AI Coach ships with every copy of Pulser.One (永久免费 on the base tier, deeper features on Pro and Enterprise) and streams straight into Pulser.Gym and Pulser.Coach. A DeepTech moat built on our own IP.
contact.page_title: 联系我们 — Pulser · 预约演示、申请数据室
contact.meta_desc: Three ways to reach us: 健身房 owners book a 20-minute demo, investors request the data room, 会员 tell us where they train.
contact.members_tell_us_where_you_train_:
Members

Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your 健身房.
contact.direct_email_works_too_gopulserf: 也可直接发送邮件：go@pulser.fit
contact.thanks_message_received_well_rep: 感谢您 — 消息已收到。我们将在 24 小时内回复。
contact.name: 姓名
for_coaches.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach is the cockpit for personal trainers and 教练 — clients, programming, 账单 and live feedback on one platform, connected to every 健身房 and 会员 on Pulser.
for_coaches.youre_a_coach_not_a_spreadsh: You're a 教练, not a spreadsheet wrangler.
for_coaches.fragmentation_eats_your_marg: 碎片化正在蚕食您的利润。
for_coaches.one_cockpit_for_everyone_you: 为您所有学员提供一个统一驾驶舱。
for_coaches.built_on_the_same_movement_e: 基于您的学员已经信赖的同一动作引擎构建。
for_coaches.stop_stitching_tools_start_t: Stop stitching tools. Start 训练.
for_coaches.programming_comms_payments_s: Programming, comms, 支付, 排课, video, client notes — none of them talk to each other.
for_coaches.chasing_clients_rebuilding_p: 联络学员、重建计划、更新电子表格 — 这些时间永远不会出现在账单上。
for_coaches.you_prescribe_a_plan_the_cli: 您制定计划。学员训练。在下次训练之前，您完全不知道实际发生了什么。
for_coaches.every_client_every_plan_ever: Every client, every plan, every 支付 status — one list, one tap. Across every 健身房 they visit.
for_coaches.draganddrop_plan_builder_wit: 支持您的模板、训练库和周期化的拖放式计划构建器 — 直接推送到学员的 Pulser.One 应用。
for_coaches.when_a_client_trains_you_see: 当学员训练时，您可以看到真实的组数、次数、节奏和动作评分 — 由 Pulser.One 内置的专有动作引擎驱动。
for_coaches.automated_nudges_video_revie: 自动化提醒、视频审查和恢复提示，AI 会帮您筛选出本周真正需要关注的学员。
for_coaches.onlineoffline_sessions_packs: 线上/线下课程、套餐、订阅、取消 — 账单自动发送。不再需要催款。
for_coaches.connect_to_gyms_on_the_pulse: Connect to 健身房 on the Pulser network. Your 会员 can train at partner 健身房; the 健身房 can offer you to their 会员.
for_coaches.pulsercoach_plugs_directly_i: Pulser.Coach plugs directly into Pulser.One (the 会员 app) and Pulser.Gym (the 健身房 OS). Whatever your client does in a session — at home, at the 健身房, on the road — flows into your cockpit in real time.
for_coaches.no_manual_logging_no_can_you: 无需手动记录。不再需要"能给我发个视频吗？"。训练之间不再盲目猜测。
for_coaches.pulsercoach_is_entering_earl: Pulser.Coach is entering early access. Join the waitlist and get priority onboarding plus a seat at the 教练 advisory board.
for_coaches.skipped_2_sessions_hrv_drop: 跳过 2 次训练 · HRV 下降
for_gyms.page_title: For Gyms — Pulser · Cut 流失, replace your stack, add AI
for_gyms.meta_desc: The 健身房 operating system that replaces Mindbody, Glofox, a 会员 app and your e-commerce — and adds an AI 教练 that cuts 流失 by 12pp.
for_gyms.crossgym_access_builtin: 跨健身房访问 · 内置
for_gyms.software_your_members_actually_: Software your 会员 actually stay for.
for_gyms.youre_paying_200800month_for_so: You're paying €200–800/月nth for software that can't talk to itself.
for_gyms.one_platform_everything_your_gy: One platform. Everything your 健身房 runs on.
for_gyms.200_members_12pp_less_churn_172: 200 会员. 12pp less 流失. €17–20K/year back in your pocket.
for_gyms.see_it_run_on_your_gym_in_20_mi: See it run on your 健身房 in 20 minutes.
for_gyms.injury_prediction_form_analysis: 损伤预测 + 动作分析
for_gyms.not_a_saas_with_an_ai_sticker_a: 不是贴了 AI 标签的 SaaS，而是拥有自己动作引擎的平台。
for_gyms.your_members_train_anywhere_you: Your 会员 train anywhere. You get new traffic in return.
for_gyms.booking_in_one_app_payments_in_: Booking in one app. Payments in another. Member app is white-labelled junk. Nothing shares data. No one sees the full 会员.
for_gyms.your_software_schedules_classes: 您的软件能排课 — 但它不会告诉您 Anna 已经 11 天没来了，距离取消会员只剩 7 天。
for_gyms.75_of_members_say_theyd_stay_if: 75% of 会员 say they'd stay if their 健身房 offered personalised plans. You can't offer what your software can't do.
for_gyms.contact_attendance_payment_enga: Contact, attendance, 支付, engagement and health data — unified per 会员.
for_gyms.group_1on1_and_pt_bookings_with: Group, 1-on-1 and PT 预约 with waitlists, 教练 rosters and auto-reminders.
for_gyms.subscriptions_dropins_packages_: Subscriptions, drop-ins, packages, failed-支付 recovery — EU-ready.
for_gyms.fully_whitelabel_ios_amp_androi: Fully white-label iOS & Android app — 会员 see your brand, not ours.
for_gyms.launch_a_branded_public_website: 几分钟内从模板发布品牌官网 — 无需网页公司，一切预先配置。
for_gyms.builtin_storefront_for_membersh: Built-in storefront for 会员hips, drop-ins, supplements, merch. +€3–6K/year typical uplift at a 200-会员 健身房.
for_gyms.realtime_form_feedback_via_the_: Real-time form feedback via the 会员's smartphone camera. Preventive health alerts from wearables.
for_gyms.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same_p: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers every 会员 on Pulser.One — 体扫描, form scoring, 伤害-risk and personalised programming. Your 健身房 becomes a place where science shows up in every session.
for_gyms.any_pulserone_member_can_check_: Any Pulser.One 会员 can check in at any partner 健身房 within their tier grade — built into the platform, not a third-party network. Automated settlement, reciprocal revenue-share, no front-desk workarounds. Travelling 会员 stay loyal; travelling 会员 from other 健身房 become your walk-ins.
for_gyms.incumbents_manage_operations_pu: 传统厂商管理运营。Pulser 管理成效。
for_gyms.mindbody_500m_revenue_3b_valuat: Mindbody: ~$500M revenue, ~$3B valuation, IPO planned. Still no AI 教练ing or 留存 prediction.
for_gyms.a_tailored_walkthrough_of_the_p: A tailored walkthrough of the platform with real data from a 健身房 your size. No slides, no sales pitch, no commitment.
for_gyms.24_more_members_retained_per_ye: 24 more 会员 retained per year
for_gyms.vs_246kyear_subscription: 对比每年 €2.4–6K 的订阅费用
for_members.page_title: For Members — Pulser.One · Your AI 教练, any 健身房, one app
for_members.meta_desc: An AI 教练 in your pocket. Personalised plans, real-time form feedback, and preventive health — built into your 健身房's branded app.
for_members.your_ai_coachany_gym_one_app:
Your AI 教练.
Any 健身房. One app.
for_members.the_coach_you_wish_you_could: The 教练 you wish you could afford. In your pocket.
for_members.three_steps_works_with_or_wi: Three steps. Works with or without your 健身房.
for_members.want_pulser_at_your_gym: Want Pulser at your 健身房?
for_members.pulser_sees_your_movement_th: Pulser 观察您的动作，然后帮助您掌握它。
for_members.one_membership_every_partner: One 会员hip. Every partner 健身房.
for_members.travelling_for_work_weekend_: Travelling for work? Weekend in a new city? Moved last month? Your Pulser.One 会员hip checks you in at any 健身房 on the network within your tier grade — with your plan, your history and your 教练 right there with you.
for_members.one_slow_rotation_with_your_: One slow rotation with your phone camera. Proportions, posture, composition estimate — without a 健身房 visit.
for_members.point_your_phone_at_yourself: 将手机对准自己。获得深蹲、硬拉、卧推的逐帧反馈 — 由我们的动作引擎驱动。
for_members.heart_rate_hrv_sleep_steps_f: 来自 Apple Health、Garmin、Whoop、Oura、Android Health Connect 的心率、HRV、睡眠和步数 — 整合到您的计划中。
for_members.overtraining_elevated_injury: Over训练, elevated 伤害 risk, recovery debt — flagged before they become problems.
for_members.walk_into_any_partner_gym_in: Walk into any partner 健身房 in the network within your tier grade — no day pass, no extra app. Your plan follows you.
for_members.book_a_human_coach_from_the_: Book a human 教练 from the Pulser.Coach network. They see your form data. Your sessions get sharper.
for_members.free_forever_works_on_its_ow: 免费 forever. Works on its own, or as the 会员 app of any 健身房 on the Pulser network.
for_members.body_scan_goals_wearable_syn: 体态扫描、目标设定、可穿戴设备同步、医疗标记。AI 教练会在几分钟内为您制定第一份计划。
for_members.home_homegym_travelgym_coach: Home, home-健身房, travel-健身房, 教练's 健身房. Cross-健身房 access is built in. Your plan adapts to every session.
for_members.tell_us_where_you_train_well: Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your 健身房. If your 健身房's not on Pulser yet, you can still use Pulser.One for 免费.
for_members.your_coach_if_you_want_one: Your 教练, if you want one
home.page_title: Pulser.fit — 面向现代健身的 DeepTech 操作系统
home.meta_desc: Gyms, 会员 and 教练 on one platform. Powered by our proprietary movement interpretation engine. Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach — in sync.
home.one_platform_three_sides: 一个平台 · 三个维度
home.feature_crossgym_access: 功能 · 跨健身房访问
home.the_deeptech_operating_system_for_m: 面向现代健身的 DeepTech 操作系统。
home.whoever_you_show_up_as_pulser_syncs: 无论您以何种角色出现，Pulser 都会为您同步。
home.one_app_any_gym_on_the_network: One app. Any 健身房 on the network.
home.a_200member_gym_before_and_after: A 200-会员 健身房, before and after.
home.why_this_wins_in_numbers: 用数据证明为什么这是赢家。
home.a_free_ai_coach_in_your_pocket_body: A 免费 AI 教练 in your pocket. Body scan, form feedback, personalised plans — and cross-健身房 access across the network.
home.stop_stitching_six_tools_clients_pr: Stop stitching six tools. Clients, programming, 账单 and live movement data in one cockpit.
home.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_everyt: Pulser is a DeepTech company. Everything on the platform is powered by our own movement interpretation engine — 体扫描, live form feedback, 伤害-risk scoring, fatigue detection and personalised periodisation. Not an OpenAI call. Not a wrapper on someone else's model. Our IP, our data, our edge.
home.the_deeper_every_gym_member_and_coa: The deeper every 健身房, 会员 and 教练 uses the platform, the better the model gets. That is the flywheel generic fitness SaaS cannot build.
home.your_pulserone_membership_checks_yo: Your Pulser.One 会员hip checks you in at any partner 健身房 of the same grade — home, travel or a spontaneous Saturday in a new city.
home.earn_reciprocal_traffic_and_revenue: Earn reciprocal traffic and revenue share on every visit from a Pulser.One 会员, with automated settlement and zero front-desk overhead.
home.your_clients_keep_training_and_you_: Your clients keep 训练 — and you keep seeing their real session data — even when they're not in your home 健身房.
home.crossgym_access_is_built_into_the_p: Cross-健身房 access is built into the Pulser.Gym and Pulser.One product from day one — not a third-party network bolted on top.
home.whether_you_run_a_gym_train_clients: Whether you run a 健身房, train clients or just want to train smarter yourself — Pulser plugs you into one platform, one engine, one network.
home.saas_spend_per_year6k12k: 年度 SaaS 支出€6K–€12K
home.tools_in_the_stack45: 技术栈中的工具数4–5
home.net_value_impact48k_yr: 净价值影响−€48K / 年
home.proprietary_movement_interpretation: 专有动作解析层 — 核心技术栈，非授权许可。
home.runs_ondevice_where_it_can_fast_pri: 尽可能在设备端运行 — 快速、私密、无云依赖。
home.designed_for_the_2026_european_heal: 为 2026 年欧洲健康数据空间法规而设计。
home.injuryrisk_models_built_on_publishe: 基于已发表研究构建的损伤风险模型 — 而非直觉。
home.eu_fitness_software_ai_coaching_tam: EU fitness software + AI 教练ing TAM
home.of_gymgoers_open_to_aipowered_coach: Of 健身房-goers open to AI-powered 教练ing
home.european_health_data_space_goes_liv: 欧洲健康数据空间正式实施
home.gen_z_picks_a_gym_based_on_the_memb: Gen Z picks a 健身房 based on the 会员 app
investors.page_title: 投资者 — Pulser · 公司简报
investors.meta_desc: Pulser 信息简报 — 面向现代健身的 DeepTech 操作系统。市场、护城河、发展动力和路线图，一站式呈现。
investors.investor_briefing_for_informat: 投资者简报 · 仅供参考
investors.a_deeptech_operating_system_fo: A DeepTech operating system for a €8.4B 健身房 software market.
investors.why_incumbents_cant_copy_this: 为什么传统厂商无法复制。
investors.from_poc_to_commercial_pilots_: 12 个月内从概念验证到商业试点。
investors.proprietary_deeptech_ip: 专有 DeepTech 知识产权
investors.we_are_not_running_a_public_fu: 我们并未在本网站进行公开融资。如果您是希望沟通的投资者，可以直接联系创始人：go@pulser.fit。
investors.global_gym_management_software: Global 健身房 management software market (2025)
investors.eu_fitness_operators_digital_s: 欧盟健身运营者数字化解决方案（约占 TAM 的 15%）
investors.600_eu_gyms_199499mo_arr_in_5_: 600 EU 健身房 @ €199–499/月 ARR in 5 years
investors.pose_estimation_biomechanical_: Pose estimation, biomechanical modelling, 伤害-risk scoring and periodisation run on our own stack — not a wrapper on a third-party API. The movement interpretation layer is the product; everything else is distribution.
investors.mindbody_and_glofox_were_built: Mindbody and Glofox were built as 排课 tools. Adding DeepTech-grade movement AI requires a unified data layer they don't have. Rebuilding takes years and alienates existing customers.
investors.camera_wearables_usershared_he: Camera + wearables + user-shared health records feed a richer model with every session across Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach. More data → better predictions → higher 留存.
investors.validation_studies_in_biomecha: 在生物力学期刊上发表的验证研究可获得 Horizon Europe 和 EHDS 资助 — 竞争对手无法获得的非稀释性资金。
investors.eu_health_data_regulation_2025: 欧盟健康数据法规（2025/327）将于 2026 年起实施。在传统系统中进行合规改造需要数年时间和数百万成本。我们从第一天起就按照 EHDS 标准构建。
investors.every_pulserone_member_can_tra: Every Pulser.One 会员 can train at any partner 健身房 in the same tier. Reciprocal traffic + automated settlement make the network more valuable with every 健身房 that joins.
investors.warsaw_gym_owners_consistent_p: Warsaw 健身房 owners. Consistent pain: fragmented tools, zero engagement data, rising 流失.
investors.first_letters_of_intent_from_b: 首批来自精品工作室的试点项目意向书。目标：2026 年第二季度前签署 5 份 LOI。
investors.eic_accelerator_poland_prize_s: EIC Accelerator + Poland Prize 已提交。创始人此前曾获得 LLB 02-242 欧盟资助。
investors.architecture_amp_prototype_des: 架构 & 原型设计就绪。基于 MediaPipe 的智能手机实时动作分析。
investors.stage_trl_2_ai_architecture_an: Stage: TRL 2 — AI architecture and prototype concept defined. Target: TRL 4–5 (lab / 健身房-validated prototype) within 12 months.
investors.this_page_is_a_public_overview: 本页面为公开概述。更深入的材料 — 技术架构、财务模型、股权结构表、LOI 和资助申请 — 将在 NDA 下与正在积极沟通的投资者一对一分享。
investors.61_of_gym_members_already_use_: • 61% of 健身房 会员 already use AI-driven fitness tools (ABC Fitness 2025)
investors.eu_ehds_regulation_creates_com: • 欧盟 EHDS 法规从 2026 年起形成合规护城河
investors.47_of_new_gym_joins_are_gen_z_: • 47% of new 健身房 joins are Gen Z — digital-native, AI-expectant
investors.mvp_ai_coach_app: • MVP + AI 教练 + 应用
investors.eu_building_mvp_first_pilots: 欧盟 · 构建 MVP + 首批试点
investors.own_movement_ip_ehdsready: 自主动作 IP · EHDS 就绪
investors.q3q4_2026_build: 2026 年第三至四季度 · 构建
platform.meta_desc: Pulser 平台：Pulser.Gym、Pulser.One 和 Pulser.Coach，均由我们专有的 DeepTech 动作解析引擎驱动。
platform.why_one_platform_beats_a_stack: 为什么一个平台胜过一堆工具
platform.three_products_one_engine: 三款产品。一个引擎。
platform.see_your_side_of_the_platform: 查看平台中属于您的一面。
platform.member_crm_scheduling_billing_b: Member CRM, 排课, 账单, branded app, e-commerce and the AI that keeps 会员 subscribed.
platform.body_scan_live_form_feedback_pe: Body scan, live form feedback, personalised plans, 伤害-risk score and cross-健身房 access — with AI Coach built in.
platform.client_roster_programming_studi: Client roster, programming studio, live session data, 账单 and a 健身房-network marketplace — one cockpit.
platform.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_ou: Pulser 是一家 DeepTech 公司。我们的动作解析引擎是自主拥有的知识产权 — 基于经同行评审的生物力学研究构建，并使用平台的真实训练数据进行训练。尽可能在设备端运行，需要时在云端扩展。
platform.every_tap_on_the_platform_feeds: Every tap on the platform feeds back into the engine. The 会员 gets better cues. The 教练 gets a clearer picture. The 健身房 gets lower 流失. The moat compounds.
platform.body_scan_posture_composition_l: 体态扫描、姿势、体成分、实时动作。一台手机摄像头，一个专有模型。
platform.rep_counting_tempo_rom_bar_path: 次数计数、节奏、关节活动范围、杠铃轨迹、风险建模 — 基于已发表的研究。
platform.hrv_sleep_activity_apple_health: HRV、睡眠、活动 — Apple Health、Garmin、Whoop、Oura、Android Health Connect。
platform.built_into_pulserone_plans_aler: 内置于 Pulser.One。计划、提醒和推送基于您自己的数据生成，而非信息流。
platform.gym_member_and_coach_all_read_f: Gym, 会员 and 教练 all read from the same source. No CSV exports. No Zapier glue.
platform.every_gym_member_and_coach_on_p: Every 健身房, 会员 and 教练 on Pulser makes every other part more valuable. Cross-健身房 access is built in.
platform.proprietary_movement_engine_is_: 专有动作引擎是我们的核心知识产权 — 不是每个竞争对手都能调用的第三方模型。
platform.designed_for_the_european_healt: 从第一天起就为欧洲健康数据空间设计 — 可移植、经同意、合规。
pricing.page_title: 价格 — Pulser · Pulser.Gym、Pulser.One 和 Pulser.Coach 定价方案
pricing.meta_desc: Three products, clear tiers. Pulser.One is 免费 for 会员. Pulser.Gym starts 免费 and unlocks the AI 教练 on Pro. Pulser.Coach priced per 教练.
pricing.pricing_three_products_clear_tie: 价格 · 三款产品，清晰的定价方案
pricing.free_for_members_fair_for_gyms_a: 免费 for 会员. Fair for 健身房 and 教练.
pricing.the_ai_coach_in_your_pocket: The AI 教练, in your pocket.
pricing.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your 健身房 on one platform.
pricing.one_cockpit_instead_of_six_tabs: 一个驾驶舱取代六个标签页。
pricing.is_pulserone_really_free_for_mem: Is Pulser.One really 免费 for 会员 forever?
pricing.how_does_the_base_perunit_pricin: 基础价格 + 按量计费如何运作？
pricing.can_i_import_my_existing_member_: Can I import my existing 会员 data?
pricing.do_members_or_coaches_need_speci: Do 会员 or 教练 need special hardware?
pricing.how_does_the_crossgym_network_wo: How does the cross-健身房 network work commercially?
pricing.how_does_ehds_compliance_affect_: How does EHDS compliance affect me as a 健身房?
pricing.everything_a_member_needs_to_sta: Everything a 会员 needs to start 训练 better. 免费 for every Pulser 会员, full stop.
pricing.for_members_who_want_deeper_insi: For 会员 who want deeper insight and cross-健身房 access. Optional — the base app stays 免费.
pricing.replace_your_scheduling_tool_tod: Replace your 排课 tool today. Solo trainers and new studios.
pricing.full_management_platform_ai_coac: Full management platform, AI Coach signals and a fully branded 会员 app. For studios, clubs and chains of any type.
pricing.multilocation_chains_franchises_: Multi-location chains, franchises and premium clubs. The base fee covers the platform and your first location; each additional 健身房 is €149/月. Custom SLA, full API, co-branded portal.
pricing.for_independent_coaches_running_: For independent 教练 running their own book of clients.
pricing.full_deeptech_cockpit_with_live_: 完整的 DeepTech 驾驶舱，配备实时动作反馈、生物力学洞察和 AI 副驾驶。
pricing.for_coaching_collectives_pt_team: For 教练ing collectives, PT teams inside 健身房 and franchises. The base includes the team cockpit and your first 3 教练 seats; each additional 教练 is €49/月.
pricing.yes_the_base_tier_is_free_foreve: Yes. The base tier is 永久免费. Only Premium (€9.99/月) adds cross-健身房 access, deep biomechanics reports and preventive health alerts — the core AI 教练 is 免费.
pricing.enterprise_gyms_pay_299mo_for_th: Enterprise 健身房 pay €299/月 for the platform (first location included) plus €149/月 per additional 健身房. Coach teams pay €149/月 (first 3 seats included) plus €49/月 per additional 教练. You only pay for what you actually run.
pricing.yes_we_support_csv_import_and_bu: Yes. We support CSV import and build custom migration scripts for Mindbody, Glofox and Virtua健身房 during onboarding.
pricing.no_form_analysis_runs_on_any_mod: 不需要。动作分析可在任何现代智能手机摄像头上运行。可穿戴设备集成可选但推荐。
pricing.each_pulserone_plus_visit_to_a_p: Each Pulser.One Plus visit to a partner 健身房 triggers automated settlement between 健身房 based on tier grade. No front-desk friction, no manual reconciliation.
pricing.ehds_becomes_mandatory_for_eu_he: EHDS 将于 2026 年起对欧盟健康数据处理平台强制实施。使用 Pulser 意味着您默认合规。
pricing.gym_pro_has_a_onetime_onboarding: Gym Pro 包含一次性入职费用，由您第一个月的节省额覆盖。Enterprise 在合同中包含定制入职服务。
pricing.book_a_20minute_call_well_map_yo: 预约 20 分钟通话。我们将为您的工作流匹配 Pulser.Gym、Pulser.One 和 Pulser.Coach 的最佳组合。
pricing.360_body_scan_amp_injury_risk_sc: ✓ 360° 体扫描 & 伤害 risk score
pricing.wearable_sync_apple_watch_garmin: ✓ 可穿戴设备同步（Apple Watch、Garmin、Whoop、Oura）
pricing.checkin_at_home_gym: ✓ Check-in at home 健身房
pricing.crossgym_access_any_partner_gym_: ✓ Cross-健身房 access (any partner 健身房, same tier)
pricing.deep_biomechanics_reports: ✓ 深度生物力学报告
pricing.preventive_health_alerts_hrv_loa: ✓ 预防性健康提醒（HRV / 负荷 / 睡眠）
pricing.ehdscompliant_health_record_vaul: ✓ 符合 EHDS 的健康记录保险库
pricing.member_crm_up_to_50: ✓ 会员 CRM（最多 50 人）
pricing.class_scheduling_amp_bookings: ✓ Class 排课 & 预约
pricing.ai_coach_signals_in_operator_das: ✓ 运营者仪表盘中的 AI 教练信号
pricing.branded_ios_android_app: ✓ 品牌 iOS + Android 应用
pricing.churn_prediction_amp_interventio: ✓ 流失预测 & 干预
pricing.full_whitelabel_site_app_amp_the: ✓ 完整白标网站、应用 & 主题定制
pricing.dedicated_success_manager: ✓ 专属客户成功经理
pricing.plan_builder_library: ✓ 计划构建器 + 资源库
pricing.client_checkins_amp_messaging: ✓ 学员签到 & 消息
pricing.live_form_feedback_per_client: ✓ 按学员的实时动作反馈
pricing.access_any_partner_gym_in_the_ne: ✓ Access any partner 健身房 in the network
pricing.team_roster_amp_shared_library: ✓ 团队名册 & 共享资源库
pricing.consolidated_invoicing_volume_di: ✓ 合并开票 + 10 席以上批量折扣
pricing.additional_revenue_streams_gyms_: Additional revenue streams (健身房 & 教练)
pulser_coach.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach 是 Pulser 平台的第三支柱：由专有 DeepTech 动作引擎驱动的私人教练完整操作系统。
pulser_coach.every_client_every_plan_zer: 每位学员。每份计划。零混乱。
pulser_coach.nobody_else_has_the_movemen: 没有其他人拥有这些动作数据。
pulser_coach.join_the_first_cohort_of_pu: 加入 Pulser.Coach 的首批用户。
pulser_coach.built_on_our_own_movement_e: 基于自主动作引擎构建
pulser_coach.connected_to_gyms_and_membe: Connected to 健身房 and 会员
pulser_coach.ehdsready_amp_eufirst: EHDS 就绪 & 欧盟优先
pulser_coach.every_client_profile_with_t: Every client profile with 训练 history, goals, limitations and live plan status.
pulser_coach.draganddrop_plan_builder_wi: 支持模板、周期化和训练库的拖放式计划构建器 — 与 Pulser.One 同步。
pulser_coach.the_deeptech_movement_engin: Pulser.One 内置的 DeepTech 动作引擎实时评估动作 — 您可以在驾驶舱中查看。
pulser_coach.scheduled_nudges_video_repl: 定时提醒、视频回复、异步语音笔记。AI 帮您排序本周最需要关注的学员。
pulser_coach.sessions_packs_subscription: Sessions, packs, subscriptions, cancellations, EU-ready 支付. Invoices go out automatically.
pulser_coach.host_sessions_at_any_gym_on: Host sessions at any 健身房 on the Pulser network. Get discovered by 会员 browsing for a 教练.
pulser_coach.the_same_proprietary_moveme: The same proprietary movement interpretation layer your clients use in Pulser.One streams into your cockpit — form score, tempo, ROM, fatigue markers. That's a DeepTech moat no generic 教练-app can copy.
pulser_coach.other_coach_tools_are_isola: Other 教练 tools are isolated. Pulser.Coach is part of a platform with 健身房 and 会员 already on it — so the people you need to reach are already here.
pulser_coach.designed_to_meet_the_2026_e: 从第一天起即按照 2026 年欧洲健康数据空间规则设计。您的学员数据保持可移植、经同意且合规。
pulser_coach.replaces_scheduling_payment: Replaces 排课, 支付, programming, video 教练ing, client CRM and analytics. Starts at 教练-friendly pricing, not SaaS-bundle pricing.
pulser_coach.pulsercoach_is_in_guided_ea: Pulser.Coach 正在进行引导式抢先体验。申请加入首批用户 — 优先入职、优惠价格、产品团队直线沟通。
pulser_gym.page_title: Pulser.Gym — The 健身房 operating system
pulser_gym.meta_desc: Pulser.Gym replaces Mindbody, Glofox, your 会员 app and your e-commerce platform with one unified 健身房 OS — powered by a proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_gym.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your 健身房 on one platform.
pulser_gym.one_workflow_one_invoice_one_: 一个工作流。一张账单。一个数据源。
pulser_gym.your_website_your_store_your_: 您的网站、商店、应用 — 全部由一个管理后台生成。
pulser_gym.start_free_unlock_the_ai_coac: Start 免费. Unlock the AI 教练 when you're ready.
pulser_gym.a_proprietary_movement_engine: A proprietary movement engine, inside your 健身房 OS.
pulser_gym.one_membership_any_gym_in_the: One 会员hip. Any 健身房 in the network.
pulser_gym.profile_attendance_payments_e: Profile, attendance, 支付, engagement, communication timeline — per 会员, in one place.
pulser_gym.classes_pt_coach_rosters_wait: Classes, PT, 教练 rosters, waitlists, capacity, reminders — drag-and-drop calendar, mobile-first.
pulser_gym.subscriptions_dropins_package: 订阅、临时访问、套餐、催款、欧盟 SEPA + 银行卡。无第三方支付网关锁定。
pulser_gym.your_logo_your_colours_your_v: 您的品牌标识、色彩和语调。iOS 和 Android，App Store 和 Play Store。
pulser_gym.ship_a_fully_branded_public_w: 几分钟内发布完整品牌官网 — 选择模板，填入内容，在自己的域名上线。
pulser_gym.sell_memberships_dropins_supp: Sell 会员hips, drop-ins, supplements, merch, digital products — one checkout, 会员 pricing, in-app purchase.
pulser_gym.members_in_the_pulserone_app_: Members in the Pulser.One app can train at any partner 健身房 of the same grade while travelling — revenue-share and reciprocal access, built in.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers the Pulser.One 会员 app — real-time 体扫描, form feedback, 伤害-risk scoring and personalised programming. Not a wrapper on someone else's model. Our own IP.
pulser_gym.any_pulserone_member_can_chec: Any Pulser.One 会员 can check in at any partner 健身房 within their tier grade — business trips, weekends away, moving cities. You get reciprocal traffic, automated settlement and zero front-desk friction.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_a_whitel: Pulser.Gym ships with a white-label site builder. Pick a template, upload your logo, set your colours and domain — and Pulser publishes a branded public website and e-commerce store wired straight into your 排课, 会员hips, 支付 and 会员 app. No web agency. No Stripe-and-Shopify glue. No separate CMS to maintain.
pulser_gym.curated_templates_for_boutiqu: Curated templates for boutique 健身房, chains, yoga, combat sports, CrossFit, climbing walls, padel clubs, sports centres. Production-ready, SEO-clean, multilingual.
pulser_gym.class_schedules_membership_si: Class schedules, 会员hip sign-up, drop-in 预约, 教练 profiles, trial offers, contact forms, Apple/Google Pay, VAT, invoices, GDPR/EHDS. All live on day one.
pulser_gym.custom_domain_ssl_your_logo_y: Custom domain, SSL, your logo, your colours, your copy. The 会员 never sees the word "Pulser" unless you want them to.
pulser_gym.the_website_the_store_the_mem: The website, the store, the 会员 app and the back office are one system, not four. A lead who lands on your home page becomes a paying 会员 without ever leaving your brand, and the data lands cleanly in one CRM from the first click to the first check-in.
pulser_gym.launch_a_new_location_seasona: 一天内上线新门店、季节性促销或细分市场产品，而非一个季度。
pulser_gym.pulsergyms_starter_tier_is_fr: Pulser.Gym's Starter tier is 免费 — replace your 排课 tool today. Upgrade to Pro for the AI 教练, branded app and cross-健身房 network.
pulser_gym.scheduling_amp_bookings_synce: • Scheduling & 预约 synced live with Pulser.Gym
pulser_gym.member_app_signup_and_deeplin: • 会员应用注册和深度链接（iOS + Android）
pulser_gym.emailsms_via_your_pulser_inbo: • 通过 Pulser 收件箱发送邮件/短信 + 自动化流程
pulser_gym.wearables_amp_health_connect_: • 可穿戴设备 & Health Connect 与 Pulser.One 对接
pulser_gym.4_members_at_high_churn_risk_: 4 会员 at high 流失 risk this week — scripted outreach ready to send
pulser_one.meta_desc: Pulser.One is the 会员 app of the Pulser platform — 训练, AI form feedback, cross-健身房 access and your built-in AI Coach, powered by our proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_one.your_gym_your_coach_your_body: Your 健身房. Your 教练. Your body. One app.
pulser_one.everything_your_coach_would_c: Everything your 教练 would charge for — built in.
pulser_one.wherever_you_train_pulserone_: 无论您在哪里训练，Pulser.One 都与您同行。
pulser_one.one_membership_any_partner_gy: One 会员hip. Any partner 健身房.
pulser_one.travelling_moving_just_curiou: Travelling? Moving? Just curious? Every Pulser.One 会员 can check in at any 健身房 on the Pulser network within their tier grade — no extra apps, no surprise day-passes. Your plan, your 教练 and your history come with you.
pulser_one.built_from_scratch_with_ai_in: 从零开始构建，AI 融入核心，而非作为营销标签附加。
pulser_one.mediapipe_tracks_33_body_keyp: MediaPipe 以 30fps 追踪 33 个身体关键点 — 无需云端，无延迟。真实关节角度、双侧对称性、每次动作的评分。
pulser_one.rotate_once_get_body_shape_fr: Rotate once. Get body shape, frame size, composition estimate, posture flags, and a 训练 plan built for your actual proportions.
pulser_one.ai_analyses_joint_biomechanic: AI analyses joint biomechanics, movement asymmetry and Health Connect data (HRV, sleep, resting HR) to predict 伤害 risk before it happens — a 0–100 score with zone breakdown and personalised prevention cues.
pulser_one.reads_fitbit_samsung_health_g: Reads Fitbit, Samsung Health, Garmin, Pixel Watch — all through one API. 500+ connected devices feed the 伤害-risk model automatically.
pulser_one.your_workout_plan_updates_bas: Your 训练 plan updates based on your 体扫描, movement history and Health Connect data. No questionnaire guessing.
pulser_one.perexercise_form_trend_joint_: 按训练项目的动作趋势、关节精度历史、个人最佳记录。清晰地看到您确实在进步。
pulser_one.barbells_cables_machines_and_: 杠铃、缆绳、器械和有氧。按训练项目追踪渐进超负荷。摄像头 AI 可以从任意角度通过支撑的手机工作。
pulser_one.bodyweight_mastery_from_begin: 自重训练精通 — 从初学者进阶到高级技巧。AI 在每次动作中追踪关节对齐、张力和节奏。
pulser_one.ai_tracks_depth_alignment_and: AI tracks depth, alignment and balance in real time. Pose-by-pose feedback, hold timers and a daily mobility programme built around your 伤害 risk score.
pulser_one.bodyweight_resistance_bands_d: 自重、阻力带、哑铃或零器材。完整的计划围绕您实际拥有的器材制定 — 而非您希望拥有的。
pulser_one.park_bars_stairs_sprints_and_: 公园单杠、台阶、冲刺和户外循环训练。Health Connect 的 GPS 和有氧数据丰富每次训练。
pulser_one.fightcamp_conditioning_sports: 格斗训练营体能训练、专项力量和爆发力训练。损伤风险引擎针对高冲击负荷进行了优化。
pulser_one.running_cycling_swimming_and_: Running, cycling, swimming and rowing — tracked via Health Connect. HRV + load monitoring feeds into your 伤害 risk score automatically.
pulser_one.returnfrominjury_progressions: Return-from-伤害 progressions, physio-grade mobility protocols and load management. Injury-risk score drives every decision automatically.
pulser_one.the_free_tier_is_genuinely_us: The 免费 tier is genuinely useful — not a crippled trial.
pulser_one.everything_you_need_to_get_st: 开始所需的一切。无试用期。
pulser_one.billed_monthly_cancel_anytime: 按月计费。随时 2 次点击即可取消。
pulser_one.prices_shown_in_local_currenc: 价格以当地货币显示（如适用）。可能需缴纳增值税。
